Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Can you believe it's already autumn? It'll be winter before you know it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...I see. It's a good thing it wasn't you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}In this world, people die every day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Until recently, I thought that was as normal as the changing of the seasons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}For the first time, I have a friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Lately, I've been remembering things more clearly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You recall the end I've spoken of? Some are calling it "the Fall" as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It's drawing closer each night. Can't you feel it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You and I are like kindred spirits, so I wonder why I'm the only one who remembers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Could it be that you can't accept me for who I am?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pharos is smiling sadly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense a bond between Pharos and me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I'm sorry if I wasn't making any sense today... Maybe it's the change of season.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But, we're still friends. That will never change.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 111 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Well, I'll be going for now. Good night.[n]{f 1 1}
